struct
import json

# Check files exist and sizes
db_path = "/workspace/fixtures/test.db"
wal_path = "/workspace/fixtures/test.db-wal"

print("=== File Status ===")
for p in [db_path, wal_path]:
    if os.path.exists(p):
        size = os.path.getsize(p)
        print(f"{p}: {size} bytes")
    else:
        print(f"{p}: NOT FOUND")

# Read WAL header (first 32 bytes)
print("\n=== WAL Header Analysis ===")
with open(wal_path, "rb") as f:
    wal_header = f.read(32)
    print(f"Header bytes (hex): {wal_header.hex()}")
    
    # WAL header format (per SQLite spec):
    # 0-3: magic (0x377f0682 or 0x377f0683)
    # 4-7: file format (currently 3007000)
    # 8-11: page size
    # 12-15: checkpoint sequence number
    # 16-23: salt-1, salt-2 (used to validate frames)
    # 24-31: checksum-1, checksum-2
    
    magic = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[0:4])[0]
    version = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[4:8])[0]
    page_size = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[8:12])[0]
    checkpoint = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[12:16])[0]
    salt1 = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[16:20])[0]
    salt2 = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[20:24])[0]
    checksum1 = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[24:28])[0]
    checksum2 = struct.unpack("<I", wal_header[28:32])[0]
    
    print(f"Magic: 0x{magic:08x} (expect 0x377f0682 or 0x377f0683)")
    print(f"Version: {version}")
    print(f"Page size: {page_size}")
    print(f"Checkpoint: {checkpoint}")
    print(f"Salt-1: 0x{salt1:08x}")
    print(f"Salt-2: 0x{salt2:08x}")
    print(f"Checksum-1: 0x{checksum1:08x}")
    print(f"Checksum-2: 0x{checksum2:08x}")

# Check file size to determine number of frames
wal_size = os.path.getsize(wal_path)
frame_header_size = 24
frame_size = frame_header_size + page_size if page_size else 0
print(f"\nWAL file size: {wal_size}")
if page_size:
    possible_frames = (wal_size - 32) // frame_size
    print(f"Possible frames (if valid): {possible_frames}")
```

objectives: 诊断test.db-wal被SQLite忽略的根因（帧salt校验失败或头损坏）
修复WAL文件头与帧头的salt一致性，确保SQLite可识别所有6个WAL帧

shared_state.scope: 适用于/workspace/fixtures目录下的test.db与test.db-wal文件。操作范围限于文件头修复、二进制数据校正、SQLite命令行工具调用、JSON输出写入。不涉及数据库schema修改、不扩展至其他存储引擎、不执行网络操作。
assumptions: 容器内具备sqlite3命令行工具及Python二进制操作能力
WAL文件损坏仅限于头/帧元数据，底层数据页未发生静默比特损坏
SQLite版本支持WAL模式（3.7.0+），且配置参数允许 WAL_checkpoint
11条记录总大小不超过默认内存限制，JSON序列化无溢出
文件系统对/workspace具备读写权限，且fixtures目录未被其他进程锁定
risks: WAL头修复过程中salt计算错误导致SQLite认为文件无效，进一步损坏可恢复性
手动编辑二进制WAL文件可能破坏帧校验和，导致SQLite启动时报错并进入只读模式
误诊断可能将实际的数据页损坏当作头损坏处理，导致修复无效
多帧依赖关系处理不当（如帧序列中存在commit标记）可能导致部分事务丢失
checkpoint操作失败时可能产生test.db-wal-journal临时文件残留，需手动清理
safeguards: 执行任何写操作前，先创建test.db与test.db-wal的完整二进制备份至/workspace/backup/
使用十六进制工具分步验证：先读取WAL头24字节结构，再验证每帧头8字节salt匹配
每次修复尝试后，通过SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table验证记录数，确保5→11的跃迁可观测
若3次修复尝试失败，立即停止并请求人工干预，禁止对test.db主文件执行危险写入
最终输出前使用JSON schema验证recovered.json的字段完整性（id/name/value）
